[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100010 3
1 10001010 3
2 00100000 1
3 00100001 2
4 00001000 1
5 01101000 3
6 10101011 5
7 00101011 4

01 10 01001000 2
12 21 00101010 3
23 32 00101011 4 match 7
34 43 00100011 3
45 54 00000010 1
56 65 00000000 a
67 76 00100000 1 match 2
70 07 00001000 1 match 4

02 20 00001000 1 match 4
13 31 00101010 3
24 42 00100011 3
35 53 00001010 2
46 64 00100000 1 match 2
57 75 10001100 3
60 06 00000000 a
71 17 00101000 2

03 30 00001000 1 match 4
14 41 01100010 3 match 0
25 52 10001010 3 match 1
36 63 00100000 1 match 2
47 74 00100001 2 match 3
50 05 00001000 1 match 4
61 16 00100000 1 match 2
72 27 10101001 4

15 51 00001010 2
26 62 00100000 1 match 2
37 73 00101001 3
